LanguageData.PM_Research_VitalFuel.label: vital fuel analysis
LanguageData.PM_Research_VitalFuel.description: By studying a recovered Sweeper fragment, you uncover the secret of vital fuel — the red liquid that animates these entities. Unlocks the Liquidifier, pipes, reservoirs and taps.
LanguageData.PM_Research_SweeperTech.label: Sweeper incubation
LanguageData.PM_Research_SweeperTech.description: Master the incubation process that lets a Mother create new Sweepers from vital fuel. Unlocks the Mother.
LanguageData.PM_Research_SweeperWeapons.label: Sweeper armament
LanguageData.PM_Research_SweeperWeapons.description: Crystallize vital fuel into weapons. Unlocks the Crystallizer and Hooks.
LanguageData.PM_Research_SweeperArmor.label: Sweeper armor
LanguageData.PM_Research_SweeperArmor.description: Forge the black armor characteristic of Sweepers. Unlocks the armor pieces at the Smithy.
LanguageData.PM_Research_SweeperAugments.label: Sweeper augmentations
LanguageData.PM_Research_SweeperAugments.description: Develop implants for your Sweepers: back tanks to store more vital fuel, and anti-hemorrhage emergency crystallizers.
LanguageData.PM_Research_Translation.label: translation
LanguageData.PM_Research_Translation.description: Sweepers speak a language of their own, incomprehensible to others — and vice versa. By compiling a lexicon from patient observation, you finally establish a linguistic bridge. Unlocks trade and eases recruitment between Sweepers and non-Sweepers.
LanguageData.PM_Research_MotherModules.label: advanced incubation modules
LanguageData.PM_Research_MotherModules.description: By dissecting the Mother's internal mechanisms, you learn to graft modules that alter its cycles: gestation acceleration, multiple production, and fuel refinement for more capable Sweepers. Unlocks the three Mother upgrade modules.
